headline: Netflix Hikes Prices For All Plans As Content Spending Surges
summary: Netflix Inc. is again raising prices across all its streaming plans. The company announced Thursday that monthly rates will climb by at least $1, citing expanding investments in original programming and live events. Netflix’s New Pricing The ad-supported plan now costs $8.99, up from $7.99, while the standard plan jumps to $19.99 and the premium tier rises to $26.99. Fees for "extra member" add-ons have also increased — $6.99 per additional user on ad-supported plans (previously $5.99) and $9.99
